name: biomedica-playing-e2e
description: Playwright E2E (Biomedica storefront) — code-first specs + BDD track.

scripts.test:bdd: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts
scripts.test:bdd:fr: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=fr
scripts.test:bdd:en: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --project=en
scripts.test:bdd:smoke: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --grep @smoke
scripts.test:bdd:smoke:fr: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --grep @smoke --project=fr
scripts.test:bdd:smoke:en: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --grep @smoke --project=en
scripts.test:bdd:e2e: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --grep @e2e
scripts.test:bdd:e2e:fr: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --grep @e2e --project=fr
scripts.test:bdd:e2e:en: npm run bddgen && playwright test -c playwright.bdd.config.ts --grep @e2e --project=en
